name: Conspiracy

draft.notes: 15-card pack plus an additional ad card. Pack: 10 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, then either a conspiracy or a card with a draft-related ability, then an ad card. Foil conspiracy/draft cards displace the conspiracy/draft slot; otherwise a foil displaces a common and appears immediately after the rare. Probably not possible for two foils in one pack.

statedRates: foil common rate ~1/9; foil rare (plus mythic) rate ~1/28; conspiracy/draft foil common rate ~1/28
sourceNotes: Draft-matters supplemental set. Composition also includes 13 conspiracy cards and 12 cards with draft-related abilities (collated in their own slot). Printed in USA. 36 packs per box.
